## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (scanner / language / sandbox / policy / output)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo clippy -j2 --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo test -j2 --workspace --all-targets` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` (if user-visible)
- [ ] Updated docs under `docs/` (if CLI surface, features, or APIs changed)
